topics: Committee for Review of Presbytery Records
synopsis: The Standing Judicial Commission voted unanimously to accept responses from Korean Southwest Presbytery as complying with the Commission's citation, forwarding those responses to the Committee for Review of Presbytery Records for further consideration.
notes: Case decided by the Standing Judicial Commission on May 17, 2018. This is an administrative matter involving presbytery compliance review rather than a full judicial case. The case was listed as docketed in 2017 and decided in GA 46 (2018). A similar case (2016-10) titled 'In re Korean Northwest Presbytery' was also decided around the same time.
